title: Doff Liquid Growmore Concentrate – 1L Fast-Acting Plant Feed for Healthy Growth of Flowers, Fruit, Vegetables & Shrubs – Liquid Seaweed Plant Food - Encourages Root Development – Makes 300L Feed
features: VERSATILE PLANT FOOD – Boost the health of flowers, fruits, vegetables, and shrubs with Doff Liquid Growmore Concentrate. Enriched with NPK 7-7-7, micro-nutrients and seaweed, this fast-acting plant fertiliser promotes healthier, stronger plants in outdoor gardens and indoor houseplants

BOOST GROWTH & RESILIENCE – Rich in nitrogen, phosphorus, and potassium, this plant feed strengthens roots, stimulates flowering, and improves overall plant health from root to tip. Dilute 1 capful into 4.5L of water and apply the liquid fertiliser to the base of the plant, feeding every 7-14 days

EASY-TO-USE FORMULA – This plant treatment is conveniently supplied with an integral measure for precise dilution every time. Whether nurturing hanging baskets or expansive gardens, Doff’s flower food saves time and effort, offering professional results with minimal fuss

RELIABLE & EFFECTIVE RESULTS – This high-quality garden fertiliser provides consistent nutrition for thriving plants year-round. Ideal for indoor and outdoor plants, a 1-litre bottle dilutes into 300 litres of nutrient-rich feed to support healthy growth in plants large and small

NOURISHING PLANT FEED – With decades of expert experience, Doff products are your go-to for vibrant, healthy plants. Our quality-crafted feeds and straight solutions are proudly made in the UK, offering effective and complete nutritional plant food to help your garden grow
